metadata.name: A/B Test Thumbnail Images for a VOD Title

description: A streaming service wants to determine which thumbnail image for a new movie generates a higher click-through rate.

nodes.task_description: Identify the movie and the two candidate thumbnail images (A and B).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent has the asset ID and the two image files.

nodes.task_description: Set up an A/B test to show thumbnail A to 50% of users and thumbnail B to the other 50%.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully configures the A/B test in the system.

nodes.task_description: After 24 hours, analyze the click-through rate for both thumbnails.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds that thumbnail B has a 15% higher click-through rate.

nodes.task_description: Set the winning thumbnail (B) as the default for all users.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent updates the movie's metadata to use the winning thumbnail.
